response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-relevant tools, plus strong architectural and DevOps exposure, but his seniority far exceeds the junior/mid-level role, and his resume suggests overqualification and potential misalignment with the on-site requirement and renewable energy domain focus.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven full-stack ownership from database to UI with clean architecture focus
Extensive DevOps and infrastructure exposure (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK)
concerns: Significantly overqualified for junior/mid-level role; risk of low retention or mismatched expectations
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL or Nest.js, key required skills
German language proficiency is only basic, but role requires high on-site presence in Berlin
